content:
🌟 ai-file-sorter | C++
🎯 Primary Use Case: Intelligent, AI-powered organization and renaming of digital files on a desktop.
✨ Key Features: • Content-aware file organization and renaming • Supports local and remote LLMs (e.g., Llama 3B, Mistral 7B) • Preview-based workflows for user control • Automatic folder creation and file sorting • Privacy-first design with local processing options
📖 Summary: AI File Sorter is a cross-platform desktop application that leverages AI to intelligently organize and rename files like images, documents, and media. It offers a privacy-first approach by supporting local LLMs and providing preview-based workflows for user-controlled file management.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
